tasks.title: Scaffold backend project under /backend
exit_criteria: Backend package imports from /backend.
Dependencies include FastAPI, Pydantic v2, pydantic-settings, SQLAlchemy asyncio, asyncpg, Alembic, cryptography, pytest, pytest-asyncio, httpx, and ruff.
Repository remains compatible with future /frontend.

tasks.title: Add app factory and health route
exit_criteria: GET /health returns {"status":"ok"}.
Health test passes.

tasks.title: Create environment config and .env.example
exit_criteria: .env.example includes SUPABASE_DATABASE_URL, PII_ENCRYPTION_KEY, DUE_SOON_WINDOW_DAYS, APP_ENV, and LOG_LEVEL placeholders.
No real secrets are committed.
DUE_SOON_WINDOW_DAYS validates as integer >= 0.
PII_ENCRYPTION_KEY is required outside test override.

tasks.title: Create Supabase/Postgres async database wiring
exit_criteria: Async SQLAlchemy engine reads SUPABASE_DATABASE_URL only from settings.
Session dependency is available for application/API layers.
No Supabase credentials are hardcoded.

tasks.title: Implement domain enums, entities, and exceptions
exit_criteria: Obligation types and statuses are represented without HTTP or ORM dependencies.
Domain exceptions exist for invalid transition, document required, version conflict, not found, and invalid invariant.

tasks.title: Implement status transition and document gate policies
exit_criteria: Valid transition matrix is accepted.
Invalid transitions are rejected.
Submission is rejected when requires_document is true and no document metadata exists.
Submission is allowed when required document metadata exists.

tasks.title: Implement backend date-derived flags
exit_criteria: is_overdue uses due_date < business_today and excludes submitted/done.
is_due_soon uses configured DUE_SOON_WINDOW_DAYS and excludes overdue/submitted/done.
Tests cover today, overdue, due soon, submitted, and done cases.

tasks.title: Implement available transition presenter rules
exit_criteria: availableTransitions is string[].
submitBlockedReason is DOCUMENT_REQUIRED or null.
No richer availableActions model is introduced.

tasks.title: Implement requiresDocument update invariant
exit_criteria: Submitted/done obligation cannot become requires_document=true without document metadata.
Invariant test covers accepted and rejected update cases.

tasks.title: Implement PII normalization, masking, and encryption helpers
exit_criteria: 12-3456789 normalizes last4 as 6789.
Full companyTaxId is encrypted using PII_ENCRYPTION_KEY.
Masked reads expose only companyTaxIdMasked.
Tests use a deterministic test key.

tasks.title: Create SQLAlchemy models and Alembic migration
exit_criteria: Tables exist for obligations, obligation_documents, and obligation_status_audit.
Indexes exist for due_date, status, and audit lookup.
Document lifecycle and status audit lifecycle are separate.
Migration targets Supabase/Postgres-compatible SQL.

tasks.title: Implement repository read and create methods
exit_criteria: Create stores status pending and version 1.
company_tax_id_encrypted and company_tax_id_last4 are persisted.
List/detail reads can include document and audit rows.
Raw companyTaxId is not stored in audit.

tasks.title: Implement atomic versioned repository mutations
exit_criteria: Generic update uses atomic conditional write by id and expectedVersion.
Document attach/delete uses atomic conditional write by id and expectedVersion.
Stale expectedVersion returns conflict and does not mutate rows.

tasks.title: Implement status change repository transaction with audit
exit_criteria: Status change uses atomic conditional write by id and expectedVersion.
Successful status change increments version and creates exactly one audit event.
Stale status change creates no audit.
Audit insert failure rolls back status/version mutation.

tasks.title: Implement application read presenters
exit_criteria: List/detail responses include isOverdue, isDueSoon, availableTransitions, submitBlockedReason, companyTaxIdMasked, document metadata, and audit history.
Raw companyTaxId is not exposed.

tasks.title: Implement application create/update/delete use cases
exit_criteria: Create always sets pending/version 1.
Generic update rejects status mutation.
Generic update requires expectedVersion and increments version.
requiresDocument update invariant is enforced.
Hard delete removes obligation from normal reads/lists.

tasks.title: Implement application document metadata use cases
exit_criteria: Attach document metadata requires expectedVersion.
Missing storageKey generates mock://obligations/{obligationId}/{fileName}.
Delete document metadata requires expectedVersion.
Document deletion preserves status audit history.

tasks.title: Implement application status change use case
exit_criteria: Valid status transition succeeds.
Invalid status transition fails with INVALID_STATUS_TRANSITION.
Document-gated submission fails without document metadata.
Document-gated submission succeeds with document metadata.
Stale expectedVersion fails with OBLIGATION_VERSION_CONFLICT.
Successful status change creates exactly one audit event.

tasks.title: Create Pydantic API schemas and error contract
exit_criteria: HTTP JSON uses camelCase.
Create schema rejects status and version.
Update schema rejects status and unknown fields.
ErrorResponse has code, message, and details.
Read schemas do not include companyTaxId.

tasks.title: Expose obligation API routes
exit_criteria: Routes exist for list, create, detail, update, delete, PATCH /status, PUT /document, and DELETE /document.
PATCH /api/obligations/{obligationId}/status is the only route that can change workflow status.
Routes return consistent error codes.

tasks.title: Add end-to-end backend behavior tests
exit_criteria: Tests cover valid status transition.
Tests cover invalid status transition.
Tests cover document-gated submission rejected and allowed.
Tests cover overdue and due soon calculation.
Tests cover raw companyTaxId never appears in read response.
Tests cover generic update cannot modify status.
Tests cover stale expectedVersion returns 409 and creates no audit.
Tests cover document deletion does not delete status audit history.

tasks.title: Document backend setup and API decisions
exit_criteria: README explains backend setup from fresh clone.
README documents Supabase env vars and no-secret policy.
README documents generating PII_ENCRYPTION_KEY.
README documents migrations, tests, and API route overview.
README states key domain decisions and out-of-scope items.

tasks.title: Run final backend quality gates
exit_criteria: ruff check passes.
ruff format --check passes.
pytest passes.
Any unavailable external Supabase verification is reported clearly.

parallel_execution_batches.reason: Create the backend skeleton before other files depend on paths and imports.
Configuration, domain shape, and schema contracts can start after scaffold with limited shared-write overlap.
Database wiring, domain policies, due flags, and PII helpers are independent once config/domain basics exist.
Transition presentation, update invariants, and persistence models touch separate modules.
Repository operations build on each other and share the same persistence files.
Application use cases can be split by behavior after repositories and domain policies exist, but shared files require coordination.
API routes must exist before end-to-end backend behavior tests can be finalized.
Documentation can be completed after routes exist.
Final quality gates run after implementation, tests, and docs are complete.

approval_gate.next_step_after_approval: Use these tasks as delivery traceability.
